title: ruehssia minutiflora
intro: Ruehssia minutiflora, also known as minute-flowered ruehssia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ruehssia minutiflora include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Ruehssia minutiflora is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
